empathy.description: The rep's ability to demonstrate genuine understanding and validation of the customer's emotions and challenges.
empathy.high_score_indicators: Used active listening cues, validated concerns, and showed emotional intelligence.
empathy.low_score_indicators: Appeared robotic or dismissive of customer frustrations.

objection_handling.description: The rep's skill in navigating pushback by acknowledging, clarifying, and resolving concerns.
objection_handling.high_score_indicators: Stayed calm, asked clarifying questions about objections, and provided value-based resolutions.
objection_handling.low_score_indicators: Became defensive, ignored objections, or gave weak, non-committal answers.

confidence.description: The rep's tone, pacing, and authoritative presence during the conversation.
confidence.high_score_indicators: Spoke clearly, avoided filler words, and maintained a steady, professional pace.
confidence.low_score_indicators: Sounded nervous, over-used filler words like 'um' or 'ah', or appeared unsure of the product value.

listening.description: The rep's ability to absorb information without interrupting and respond directly to what was said.
listening.high_score_indicators: Paused after questions, didn't interrupt, and referenced customer comments later in the call.
listening.low_score_indicators: Interrupted frequently, talked over the customer, or asked questions that were already answered.

executive_communication.description: The rep's ability to speak concisely and frame value in terms of business outcomes rather than just features.
executive_communication.high_score_indicators: Focused on ROI and business impact, spoke with clarity, and avoided excessive technical jargon.
executive_communication.low_score_indicators: Focused purely on features, rambled, or failed to connect product capabilities to business goals.

questioning_ability.description: The rep's skill in using open-ended questions to drive discovery and uncover deep pain points.
questioning_ability.high_score_indicators: Asked multiple 'Why' and 'How' questions, followed up on customer answers, and drove the narrative.
questioning_ability.low_score_indicators: Asked simple binary (Yes/No) questions or failed to dig deeper into customer statements.
